query:
SELECT planName, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(externalId ORDER BY externalId SEPARATOR ',') as serviceIds
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND monthlyCost = 0
  AND (status IS NULL OR status != 'terminated')
  AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
  AND (
    planName LIKE '%NBN%' OR planName LIKE '%Cellular%' OR planName LIKE '%Acronis%' 
    OR planName LIKE '%Bonder%' OR planName LIKE '%4G SIM Backup%' OR planName LIKE '%TPG%'
    OR planName LIKE '%PremSupport%' OR planName LIKE '%StandSupport%'
    OR planName LIKE '%Cellular Internet%' OR planName LIKE '%Auto Dialler%'
    OR planName LIKE '%Estimated Phone Usage%'
  )
GROUP BY planName
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT planName, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(externalId ORDER BY externalId SEPARATOR ',') as serviceIds
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND monthlyCost = 0
  AND (status IS NULL OR status != 'terminated')
  AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
  AND (
    planName LIKE '%NBN%' OR planName LIKE '%Cellular%' OR planName LIKE '%Acronis%' 
    OR planName LIKE '%Bonder%' OR planName LIKE '%4G SIM Backup%' OR planName LIKE '%TPG%'
    OR planName LIKE '%PremSupport%' OR planName LIKE '%StandSupport%'
    OR planName LIKE '%Cellular Internet%' OR planName LIKE '%Auto Dialler%'
    OR planName LIKE '%Estimated Phone Usage%'
  )
GROUP BY planName
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
